goal: 工作流规则对齐与文档债务清理：1) smoke-tester.md Phase 2 对齐 R-12（通过 service-agent 启服务而非直接启动）；2) agent-system.md 称呼统一（实现者→task-executor）和验证方法更新（cpp/h/ets→ts/tsx）；3) contract-mechanism.md 示例格式更新（加 trace_id/retry_count/hooks）和生命周期状态对齐
verification: grep 确认无'实现者'术语残留
grep 确认 smoke-tester 无直接 -NoNewWindow 启服务

coverage_checklist.smoke_tester_r12: assert: smoke-tester.md Phase 2 启动方式改为引用 service-agent，移除直接 Start-Process -NoNewWindow
coverage_checklist.agent_system_terminology: assert: agent-system.md 工作区隔离表中'实现者'改为'task-executor'
coverage_checklist.agent_system_verify_method: assert: agent-system.md 验证方法中 grep 模式由 .cpp|.h|.ets 改为 .ts|.tsx
coverage_checklist.contract_mechanism_example: assert: contract-mechanism.md 示例合同格式包含 trace_id/retry_count/hooks 字段
coverage_checklist.contract_mechanism_lifecycle: assert: contract-mechanism.md 生命周期描述从 in_progress 改为 pending/active/completed/failed
coverage_checklist.no_outdated_terms: assert: grep 检查所有 .md 文件中无'实现者'术语残留
